base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of trees_bg_loop_overworld — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1985 super mario bros. 48-tile-wide (3-screen) parallax background — tree trunks + foliage + fence + distant clouds. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 48-tile-wide (3-screen) parallax background — tree trunks + foliage + fence + distant clouds; appears in forested overworld levels; trees alternate tall and short groupings creating visual rhythm
